note: Autonomous domain checklist per HACF Step 12d. Person delegated full autonomy; recommended defaults from feature-discoveries have been adopted.

excluded.item: placing real orders on any platform's trading API
excluded.rationale: boundary.txt B1/B2/INV-007 — system is paper-only; adapters expose READ methods only

excluded.item: user accounts, sessions, login screens, roles
deployment beyond localhost — no Vercel, AWS, Docker orchestration
excluded.rationale: boundary.txt explicit — runs on person's machine only

excluded.item: iOS and Android apps, React Native, responsive breakpoints below tablet width
excluded.rationale: stated-intent says 'local web application'; mobile is not referenced anywhere
not referenced in stated-intent; dashboard + screens are the only surface

excluded.item: integrated news feed, RSS, sentiment API
excluded.rationale: news-spike-fade trigger is a PRICE-MOVE proxy (10% / 15min), not a news-event subscription; feature-discoveries STR-04 pitfall acknowledges this

excluded.item: trained predictors, LLM oracles, neural-net forecasters for Kelly p-source
excluded.rationale: feature-discoveries OQ-04 recommended default = cross-platform-mean p_source; explicit ML predictors are out of scope

excluded.item: 1099 export, audit trail for regulators, GAAP P&L formats
excluded.rationale: paper trading is not a real-money activity; boundary.txt excludes this

excluded.item: shared portfolios, multi-tenant strategies, collaborative backtests
manifold MULTIPLE_CHOICE / PSEUDO_NUMERIC / FREE_RESPONSE markets; market-side values beyond yes/no
excluded.rationale: feature-discoveries OQ-10 recommended default — v1 binary only. Multi-contract PredictIt markets flattened to one-market-per-contract

excluded.item: modeling kalshi taker fees (up to 3%), polymarket gas, predictit per-trade fees in paper-fill cost
excluded.rationale: feature-discoveries OQ-06 recommended default — fees = 0 in strict paper mode; person has not asked for fee realism

excluded.item: server-sent events, long-polling to client, live tick push to UI
excluded.rationale: tech-stack.json data_refresh_policy = poll every 30s; UI polls backend for updates

excluded.item: light mode, theme toggles, user color customisation
comments, shared strategy recipes, leaderboards, follow/share
csv import of positions from external brokerage, rolling over a real Kalshi account history
excluded.rationale: not in stated-intent; paper-fills originate only from submit-paper-trade or strategy.decide

excluded.item: a 'go-live' button that flips a strategy from paper to real money
excluded.rationale: INV-007 hard ban on real trading endpoints; no code path leads from paper to real

excluded.item: downloading strategies from an online registry, strategy signing / code validation
excluded.rationale: strategies/ folder is filesystem-only; person drops python files they trust

excluded.item: ML or fuzzy-match AUTO pairing of kalshi/polymarket/manifold markets for arbitrage
excluded.rationale: feature-discoveries OQ-05 recommended default — v1 manual mapping table only; v2 fuzzy-with-human-confirmation is future scope

excluded.item: a 'sell-to-open' short path that bypasses the BUY-NO convention
excluded.rationale: feature-discoveries OQ-09 recommended default — sell = close existing paper-position; opening a short ≡ BUY on the opposite market-side

included_from_open_questions.resolution: backtest date-range picker disables dates before min(stored-price-history.timestamp) per selected platform
brier-score forecast = entry price from paper-fill; tooltip documents this on the brier tile
cancelled markets → realised-pnl = 0 (cost refunded); excluded from brier-score N; excluded from win-rate denominator
cross-platform-arbitrage uses manual mapping table in v1
strategy-parameters include fade_timeout (60min) and close_buffer (15min) defaults; visible on Strategies screen
market-maker passive fills trigger when real top-of-book CROSSES our quoted price; fill size = min(quote_size, opposing-side top-of-book size)
